This is the FULL VERSION of Live, Sahara Surfers' entry to The Party 1994
PC 64k intro competition. The only difference between this and the
competition version is sound card support - the competition version only
supports Gravis UltraSound.

Machine requirements:
        * Intel 80386 or compatible, preferably 486DX or higher
        * Free memory, 500kb should be enough
        * Register level compatible VGA card, preferably VLB or PCI

A sound card is RECOMMENDED.



Credits:
--------

Music:          Janne Oksanen, a.k.a. Stratos

Coding:         Petteri Kangaslampi, a.k.a. Alfred
                Jarno Paananen, a.k.a. Guru

        with

                Teemu Kalvas, a.k.a. Switch


This intro uses MIDAS Sound System v0.40a, which hopefully will be
released in January 1995. The MIDAS v0.40 package will also include
FULL SOURCE CODE for this intro. The music from this intro will also be
released later, if no one manages to rip it. Try your luck - the first one
to rip the music will get a lollipop and a Carebear sticker!

Kissanmaankatu 24 E 73

Finland
Europe

trreka@uta.fi


E-mail preferred. For fastest possible response send e-mail to
pekangas@sci.fi.
